headline: Memory-Chip Selloff Drags Nasdaq 100 Lower, SanDisk Sinks 13%: Stock Market Today
summary: A brutal semiconductor and memory selloff dragged the Nasdaq and tech sector lower, even as soft June PPI and strong bank earnings steadied the broader tape.
